posts.author: YanivGershman (Yaniv Gershman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Option to inherit all changes from main board under same Workspace, for example I created board for asset and duplicate this board to 45 other assets… Today to create change on all assets I need to run on all 46 boards

Solution: to make MDM for all drop down columns or Main(parent) Board
